response:
" <<the journey of a daughter>>  

the trip began with a book in hand, the body felt the weight of the journey, the committee made the final decision. the daughter stood alone, the daughter faced the unknown, the trip was a test of will. the base of the trip was the desire to find something lost.  

* * *  

the alcohol was a mistake, the body was weak, the trip was a blur. the daughter whispered to the wind, the daughter asked for guidance, the base of the journey was unclear. the committee had no choice, the daughter had no voice, the trip was a burden.  

* * *  

the book was a map, the body was a vessel, the trip was a path. the daughter walked alone, the daughter found her way, the base of the journey was truth. the committee had failed, the daughter had grown, the trip was complete. the book was closed, the body was free, the trip was over. the daughter was whole, the daughter was free, the trip was a memory. "
